payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a padded chair back with vertical channeling upholstered in alternating maroon, dark brown and beige glossy fabric or leather; rounded vertical ribs and reflective highlights visible, suggesting the object is close to the camera (approx. 0.7 m).
